blocks.text: In that day, you shall say: “I give thanks to You, O Lord! Although You were wroth with me, Your wrath has turned back and You comfort me,
Behold the God who gives me triumph! I am confident, unafraid; For Yah the Lord is my strength and might, And He has been my deliverance.”
Joyfully shall you draw water From the fountains of triumph,
And you shall say on that day: “Praise the Lord, proclaim His name. Make His deeds known among the peoples; Declare that His name is exalted.
Hymn the Lord, For He has done gloriously; Let this be made known In all the world!
Oh, shout for joy, You who dwell in Zion! For great in your midst Is the Holy One of Israel.”
